name: Beer Cheese Bread
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces Jack cheese, cut into 1/4 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Warm the beer and American cheese over low heat on top of the stove or in a microwave. The cheese does not need to melt completely.
2. Stir the mixture until combined.
3. Add all ingredients in the order listed if using a home-type automatic baking machine. Prepare your second batch before tasting the first loaf, as you'll want more soon.
P.S.: This is not for those on a diet.
